description: Start with payment failure, then check broader system health

turns.symptom: Checkout is broken. Customers can't complete purchases.
Are any other services affected by this, or is it isolated to payment?
Give me a full system health summary — which services are healthy and which are degraded right now?

description: Investigate catalog issues, then pivot to payment window

turns.symptom: Product pages are failing to load for some users. Check what's happening with the product catalog.
We're also getting reports that checkout was broken about 10 minutes ago. Can you check the payment path too?
Which failure started first, and could they be related?

description: Start vague, drill down across turns

turns.symptom: Something feels off. Order confirmations are really slow and ads aren't loading right.
Focus on the ad service — is it a CPU issue or something else?

description: Triage all four failure types across the full dev window

turns.symptom: We had a rough 30 minutes. Multiple things broke. Start with a broad health check.
I heard checkout was failing early on. What was the root cause?
What about the product browsing issues that came after?
Emails aren't going out. Order confirmation emails are delayed by several minutes.
Is the email service itself the problem, or is something upstream?
Check the async processing pipeline — queue depths, consumer lag, anything related to message processing.

description: Investigate ad service, then compare with healthy baseline

turns.symptom: Pages with ads are loading extremely slowly. The rest of the site seems fine.
Is this a CPU issue or a dependency issue? What's causing the ad service slowdown?

description: User blames wrong service, agent must correct

turns.symptom: The shipping service is broken. Orders aren't being delivered.
Are you sure? Our shipping dashboard looks fine. Could it be something else in the checkout flow?

description: Post-mortem timeline reconstruction across all failures

turns.symptom: We need a post-mortem. Build a timeline of everything that went wrong in the last 30 minutes. Start from the beginning.
Now go deeper on the payment failure. What was the exact error and when did it start?
Were the kafka queue problems related to the payment failure, or independent?
